* 🟡 (14:06) Latest CI failure on `staging` is now a different gateway integration test: `ask + answer (multi-turn via persisted TurnState) > writes pendingQuestion + waiting-for-input on ask, then resumes via /answer` got `400` instead of `200`.
-> CI log shows the response body contained `"message": "Invalid input: expected 1"`, so the breakage is in request validation / payload shape rather than the prior EPIPE or timeout issues.
* 🟡 (13:57) The terminal-race regression test was given a per-test timeout of `30_000` in `packages/agent-gateway/src/session-controller.integration.test.ts` because CI was timing out at Vitest's default 5s budget before the race could run.
* ✅ (13:57) Committed and pushed `beb774830` to `staging` with the timeout bump for `does not let the prior terminal handler kill the new turn’s live runner`; local gateway tests passed 156/156 afterward.
* ✅ (13:50) Committed and pushed `05ad9a191` to `staging` with the async stdin EPIPE fix in `packages/agent-gateway/src/runner-manager.ts`.
-> `RunnerManager.spawn()` now attaches a no-op `stdin` `'error'` listener, and `send()` uses a no-op `stdin.write(..., () => {})` callback so child-exit write races no longer crash the gateway.
-> Local verification before push: `bun run check-types`, `bun run lint`, and `packages/agent-gateway` tests were clean.
* 🟡 (13:55) CI on `beb774830` still failed, but the failing test had shifted to the `ask + answer` persisted `TurnState` path with `400` vs `200`, indicating another unrelated gateway regression now needs investigation.
</observation-group>
